Source: Bank of Canada. GoC benchmark bond yields, daily.
2Y–10Y Spread
%
Source: Bank of Canada. 10-year minus 2-year GoC benchmark yield spread, daily.
Real Rates
Real Policy Rates (ex-post)
%
Source: Bank of Canada; Statistics Canada. Overnight rate and 2-year GoC yield minus trailing headline CPI Y/Y, monthly. Ex-post real rates.
CORRA vs Target
CORRA vs Overnight Rate Target
%
Source: Bank of Canada. CORRA (Canadian Overnight Repo Rate Average) vs overnight rate target, daily. Floor system in effect since April 2022.

%
Source: Bank of Canada. Total assets and GoC bonds held, weekly, C$ billions.
BoC Liabilities
BoC Liabilities — Settlement Balances
%
Source: Bank of Canada. Settlement balances held overnight at the BoC, weekly, C$ billions.
Peer Central Banks
Peer Central Bank Policy Rates
%
Source: Bank of Canada; Federal Reserve; ECB; Bank of England; RBA (via FRED/OECD). Policy rates: BoC overnight, Fed funds midpoint, ECB deposit facility, BoE Bank Rate, RBA cash rate. Monthly.
About this dashboard — Built by jayzhaomurray using public data from Statistics Canada, the Bank of Canada Valet API, the Federal Reserve (FRED), and the Alberta Economic Dashboard. Raw data available as CSV in the GitHub repository. Section blurbs are AI-generated from public data using a fixed analytical framework verified against primary sources. Not investment advice.
